title: Microstegia aspera
taxonomy: Microstegia aspera is a species of plant in the family Amaranthaceae. The genus Microstegia belongs to the tribe Amarantheae and is native to the Mediterranean region. Microstegia aspera is a type of succulent shrub that is often found growing in dry and rocky areas. The classification of Microstegia aspera is still being researched and refined by botanists, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Amaranthaceae family. Further taxonomic analysis may be necessary to accurately classify this species.
